text: I start my day at 6:30 AM, beginning with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. My workday starts at 8:30, and I usually spend the morning on focused tasks like writing or meetings. During lunch, I take a 20-minute walk for exercise. By 5 PM, I finish work and head to the gym for a workout. In the evening, I cook dinner, read a book, or watch a show. I try to be in bed by 10:30 PM. This routine helps me stay productive and balanced every day.
